title: Module doc claims Linux headless not yet tested — now verified
description: The module doc says 'Integration-tested on: macOS, Windows (not yet). Linux desktop: not yet.' and the integration test comment says 'put succeeds but get returns NotFound on a headless server'. Both are now wrong. dbus-run-session + gnome-keyring-daemon --unlock --components=secrets makes the integration_roundtrip test pass on a headless Linux server (verified 2026-04-28). The doc and comment need to be updated to reflect this and document the dbus-run-session invocation pattern.
